goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'centre' and 'doesn't need to include internet'.
The hotel should 'include free parking'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be 'in the same area as the hotel' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee', 'phone number', and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the centre and doesn't need to include internet
The hotel should include free parking
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Make sure you get star of the hotel
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the hotel and should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get entrance fee, phone number, and address
